title: Cobblemon: Cosmetic Expansion
description: Adds cosmetic for Pokémon in Cobblemon.
body:
## Overview
This addon adds cosmetics and custom models for Pokémon in Cobblemon using the Cosmetic Slot system.

## Currently Included
Cosmetics
- Shadow Mewtwo — Equip a Gold Ingot in the cosmetic slot
- Armored Mewtwo — Equip an Iron Chestplate in the cosmetic slot
- Gold / Ethan Pichu, Pikachu, Raichu — Equip a Yellow Apricorn in the cosmetic slot
- Lucario Mega Ring Cosmetic — Equip a Red Wool in the cosmetic slot
- Charizard Adept Style — Equip a Black Wool in the cosmetic slot
- Sableye Zirco Trading Style — Equip a Black Wool in the cosmetic slot
- Gardevoir Fashionable Style — Equip a Pink Wool in the cosmetic slot
- Armored Mewtwo: Mewtwo Strikes Back Evolution — Equip a Netherite Chestplate in the cosmetic slot
## New Models
(Requires Cobblemon Mega Showdown)
Mega Sceptile
Mega Mewtwo X
Mega Mewtwo Y
## Credits
All base models are from the Cobblemon mod.
